name: John Milton
title: Poet
bio: English poet and intellectual who served as a civil servant during the Commonwealth. Best known for the epic poem 'Paradise Lost,' considered one of the greatest works in the English language.
faith: A deeply devout Puritan Christian, Milton's magnum opus 'Paradise Lost' aimed to 'justify the ways of God to men.' His works are saturated with biblical themes and theological reflection.

sources.title: John Milton — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his Puritan faith and theological writings

sources.title: Paradise Lost — Wikipedia
sources.note: His epic Christian poem retelling the Fall of Man

tagline: Justified the ways of God to men through Paradise Lost
